title: Luffy Battles Cracker
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Reiju, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Pudding as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Luffy fights one of Big Mom’s Sweet Commanders while the rescue mission grows more dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Big Mom's connections run very far... and very deep.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was told that you had been keeping a residence at this man's establishment until roughly 2 years ago!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: We've already pinpointed his current location...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As well as the name of his sea restaurant... the 'BARATIE'!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What's wrong? You're looking a bit... pale.

dialogue.speaker: Reiju
dialogue.text: The pirate Sanji himself...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: seems to be opposed to the marriage arrangements as well.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If worse comes to worse, then feel free to use these wrists...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It may be a bit heavy handed but exploiting this 'weakness' of his is sure to yield favorable results.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: ...In the event...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that you insist on challenging and defying my orders...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the house was that I was

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have it on good author- ity that this man will meet an unexpected and untimely death!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This will be your first and only warning on the matter.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: get it through that thick skull of yours...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do not rock the boat... do not cause any waves.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I know you're fully aware what each and everyone of us here are capable of.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This process will go off with- out a hitch... and you will accept it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You will say goodbye to your old friends and your old life.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As long as you're obedient and follow through with this marriage...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: everything and everyone will come out of this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: unscathed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: But I was trying...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: to kill you!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Keep telling yourself that, you shitty ol' geezer!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Where do you get off being so forgiving and treating me so nicely?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: This is beyond awesome, you shitty gramps!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have been looking for a long time and I have been looking for a while now. I'm not sure if I can't get a chance to get a little more of the time.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this is what a sea restaurant looks like!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Things will only get tougher and harder, starting today!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've got nothing to worry about! You've got me by your side!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Oi, you depraved lil' Egg- plant!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I cook faster in my sleep, lil' eggplant!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why You LIL' Eggplant... Must you always get distracted by every pass- ing pair of breasts?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: BWAH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: YA' shot-nosed lil' Egg- Plaaant!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Oi,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: SANji...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Try not to catch a cold...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Owner ZEF!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Till my dying day, I shall never forget...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: EVERY- THING YOU'VE DONE FOR THIS SHITTY LIL EGGPLANT!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Furthermore,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Let us make tomorrow a great and memorable day.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We will be having lunch...

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: with big mom and pudding later today.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Make yourself present- able when the time comes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the day, and I was

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 48 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
